calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-01-2024 Vacated

Notice Of Motion: To Compel Supplemental Responses To Request For Admissions, Request For Production Of Documents And Special Interrogatories; And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-10-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Sumedh Rishi, Esq. 646-468-4257 for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Discussed. The Court announces he did not receive a contest email. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ORLANDO GARCIA's Motion: To Compel Supplemental Responses To Request For Admissions, Request For Production Of Documents And Special Interrogatories; And Request For Sanctions.

The unopposed motion is granted.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in word format and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at JPDeol@dhillonlaw.com.

Judge Pro Tem: John-Paul Deol, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-28-2023 Set For Trial On Mar-04-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
